allow: Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36" "https://bni-romania.com/ro-RO/chapterdetail?chapterId=sTA7kk%2F2mkqMQUuU3AovBA%3D%3D&name=BNI+PRIME" -o /tmp/bniprime.html -w "HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\\n" --max-time 30)
